guide_gray_garment_bound_edge_under_pres.query: a worker feeds the navy-bound edge of a gray garment under the sewing machine presser foot and guides it with both hands

remove_gray_garment_from_sewing_machine.query: a worker pulls a gray garment toward themselves and away from the sewing machine needle area

trim_excess_navy_binding_with_scissors.query: a worker holds the edge of a gray garment with the left hand and uses large reddish-brown scissors in the right hand to cut the protruding navy binding

align_navy_bound_edge.query: a worker pinches the navy-bound edge of a gray garment with both hands and repeatedly repositions their fingers along the edge to straighten it

turn_and_spread_gray_garment.query: a worker turns a gray garment over with both hands and spreads it back out on the worktable

pull_loose_white_thread_from_seam.query: a worker pinches a loose white thread protruding from an inner seam of a gray garment and repeatedly pulls it toward themselves

position_gray_garment_edge_at_presser_fo.query: a worker brings the edge of a gray garment to the sewing machine needle area and positions it at the presser foot
